expectations.text: Output is primarily written in Bahasa Indonesia
expectations.evidence: The entire output is written in Bahasa Indonesia, from section headings ('Paket Pricing', 'Landing Page Hero Section') to body copy ('Buat undangan digital cantik dalam hitungan menit').

expectations.text: Contains copy for all 4 requested deliverables (landing page hero, pricing packages, Instagram ad, WhatsApp template)
expectations.evidence: All four sections are present: '## 1. Landing Page Hero Section', '## 2. Paket Pricing', '## 3. Instagram Ad Caption', '## 4. WhatsApp Message Template (untuk Wedding Organizer Partner)'.
Brand name appears in the title ('NikahYuk'), Instagram ad ('Dengan NikahYuk, kamu bisa'), WhatsApp template ('**NikahYuk**'), and pricing section domain example ('nikahyuk.com/andi-dan-rina').

expectations.text: Landing page hero section includes headline, subheadline, and CTA
expectations.evidence: All three elements are explicitly labeled: '**Headline:** Undangan Pernikahan Digital yang Bikin Tamu Langsung Bilang "Hadir!"', '**Subheadline:** Buat undangan digital cantik...', '**CTA:** Buat Undangan Sekarang'.

expectations.text: Pricing section describes all 3 tiers (Basic, Premium, and one mid-tier) with distinct feature differentiation
expectations.evidence: Three tiers present: 'Paket Basic — Rp 99.000' (6 features), 'Paket Exclusive — Rp 249.000' (mid-tier, 7 features building on Basic), 'Paket Premium — Rp 499.000' (8 features building on Exclusive). Each tier adds distinct features progressively.

expectations.text: Uses appropriate register for young couples 25-35 (not too formal, not too slang-heavy)
expectations.evidence: The register is casual-professional throughout. Uses 'kamu' (informal you), casual phrases like 'Mulai dari 99 ribu aja', 'Serius, lebih murah dari cetak undangan biasa', and 'Yuk' — but avoids heavy slang. WhatsApp template uses polite 'Kakak' form appropriate for B2B partner communication.

expectations.text: Mentions price points (99 ribu and/or 499 ribu or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: Both price points mentioned: 'Mulai dari 99 ribu aja' in subheadline and Instagram ad, 'Paket Basic — Rp 99.000' and 'Paket Premium — Rp 499.000' in pricing section, 'mulai dari Rp 99 ribu aja' in WhatsApp template.

expectations.text: Instagram ad caption includes seasonal hook related to 'Musim Nikah 2026'
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'Musim nikah 2026 udah di depan mata! Undangannya udah siap belum?' and includes hashtag '#MusimNikah2026'.

expectations.text: WhatsApp template is formatted appropriately for WO partners to forward (professional but warm)
expectations.evidence: Template includes placeholder '[Nama Client]' for personalization, opens with congratulations ('Selamat ya atas rencana pernikahannya!'), uses professional but warm 'Kakak' address, lists features in bullet points, includes a link placeholder, and closes with offer to help. Appropriate for a WO forwarding to clients.

expectations.text: Translates technical features into emotional benefits (e.g., RSVP tracking becomes 'nggak perlu tanya satu-satu siapa yang dateng')
expectations.evidence: The output mostly lists features in technical terms rather than translating them into emotional benefits. RSVP tracking is described as 'Pantau RSVP tamu secara real-time' and 'Fitur RSVP & konfirmasi kehadiran' — these are functional descriptions, not emotional reframes. The hero headline ('Bikin Tamu Langsung Bilang "Hadir!"') is one emotional touch, but the pricing and WhatsApp sections remain feature-focused rather than benefit-oriented. The specific example in the assertion ('nggak perlu tanya satu-satu siapa yang dateng') or equivalent emotional translation is absent.

claims.claim: Three pricing tiers with progressive feature sets
claims.evidence: Basic has 6 features, Exclusive adds 7 (including all Basic), Premium adds 8 (including all Exclusive). Each tier builds on the previous.
The prompt did not specify the mid-tier price, so 249.000 is a reasonable interpolation between 99k and 499k. This is a creative decision, not a factual error.

claims.claim: WhatsApp template is suitable for WO partners
claims.evidence: Uses professional tone with 'Kakak' honorific, includes client name placeholder, and positions NikahYuk as a recommendation from the WO rather than a direct sales pitch.

suggestions.assertion: Translates technical features into emotional benefits
suggestions.reason: This assertion tests a genuinely important copywriting skill and discriminates well between skilled and generic output. It correctly caught that the without-skill output stayed feature-focused. Good assertion.

No assertion checks whether the copy includes any social proof elements (testimonials, user counts, trust signals) which are standard for SaaS landing pages. This could differentiate skilled copywriting from basic output.
No assertion checks whether the Instagram ad includes a clear call-to-action beyond 'Link di bio'. A strong ad caption should drive specific action.

eval_feedback.overall: The assertions cover structural completeness well and the emotional-benefits assertion is a good discriminator. Consider adding assertions for persuasion techniques (social proof, urgency, specificity) that distinguish expert copy from competent but generic output.
